text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It's race day. As I'm standing on the<n>sidelines...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot Super Creek waiting for the<n>race to start
with a serious look in her<n>eyes, while Oguri
Cap's expression<n>is oddly blank.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: OGURI!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hyah?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Are you all right? You usually look<n>more relaxed...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...For some reason, when I heard<n>people from my
hometown were<n>going to be in the audience... my
body<n>just stiffened up.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's nerves? Would eating<n>some candy
help?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, I'll take some.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap takes the candy from Super<n>Creek and
seems to calm down.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how is it that even at a time like<n>this, you're
still able to look out for<n>others?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're racing too. Shouldn't you be<n>focused on
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you asked me a similar<n>question before,
didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Since then, I've been thinking tomyself. Why do I want to takecare of others?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
For a long time, I didn't have an<n>answer. But I
think I finally get it now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I want to race at full strength.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Think about it. Do you think you can<n>run your
best when you're nervous,<n>Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Probably... not.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Right? And when you can't run to the<n>best of
your ability, you feel<n>disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I think that's probably why I look<n>after everyone.
So everyone can run<n>their hearts out.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see... You really are caring.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I don't see it that way. I just<n>want to race
everyone when they're<n>at their best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Heh, okay. Then I'll make sure I<n>don't hold back!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't want it any other way! ♪<n>Let the best
runner win today!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm going to pass out the rest of<n>the candy
to the other racers.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Super Creek hands<n>out candy
to all her rivals.
